title: rhapizo #4474
definition:
1) to smite with a rod or staff
 2) to smite in the face with the palm of the hand, to box the ear
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to smite with a rod or staff
 2) to smite in the face with the palm of the hand, to box the ear

    NASB:  to strike with a rod, hence to strike with the palm of the hand:
